title: [MTR4] R-net Stadler FLIRT 3
description: Stadler FLIRT 3 retexture of the BR423 for MTR
body: This pack adds a retexture of the DB BR423, based on the Stadler FLIRT 3 operated by NS (as RNET) between Alphen aan den Rijn and Gouda. It comes with a custom soundset recorded from its real life counterpart.
